form.formComment: Suited by inside box. Latest effort finished 7th over 390m at Shepparton beaten 6 lengths (23.06) behind Aston Major in a Maiden on April 10. Expected to bounce right back. Hard to beat.

form.formComment: Last start finished 5th on April 13 over 390m at Shepparton behind Storm Shadow beaten 5.5 lengths (22.66) in a Maiden H. Forward showing expected.

form.formComment: Bounced back last start after failing to finish two starts back when she finished 3rd over 300m at this track beaten 2.5 lengths (16.98) behind Sophie Banjo in a Maiden on March 27. Comes out of a hot form race. Worth following up.

form.formComment: Has ability but remains a maiden after 16 starts, the most recent effort a fourth (25.85) over 450m at Shepparton. Goes well here despite having never won. Looking to others.

form.formComment: Two runs so far have been ordinary, the latest when beaten 16 lengths into seventh over 525m at The Meadows. This looks a nice race so he can improve.
